repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #77339 so it can receive a fresh ClawSweeper verdict: rebase or refresh the branch onto current main, address the ClawSweeper stored data-model compatibility concern for clearing persisted runtime model/modelProvider fields, and keep the patch limited to the existing auto-reply reset-cache fix.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(auto-reply): clear runtime model cache on reset
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair pass for Clownfish automerge on https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77339.

Scope:
- refresh the contributor branch onto current main if needed;
- keep the fix limited to clearing persisted runtime model/modelProvider cache fields during auto-reply /new and /reset;
- address ClawSweeper's stored data-model compatibility concern with code comments, tests, or proof that old persisted rows are safely handled;
- preserve the existing changelog entry and contributor attribution.

Validation:
- pnpm install --offline --frozen-lockfile
- pnpm test -- src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts
- ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/session.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts
- git diff --check
- pnpm check:changed -- --base origin/main --head HEAD

Refs:
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77339
- Canonical issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/77322

Credit: preserves attribution for the original contributor work in #77339.
credit_notes: Repair the contributor branch for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77339 rather than replacing it; preserve PR author credit for @mjamiv and commit author credit from the existing head where possible.
If a replacement becomes necessary later, include source PR credit for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77339 and mention @mjamiv in the PR body.
